goal: Make the CUDA real-adapter handoff directly executable for the external CUDA host operator by emitting a reviewed shell artifact from scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py. The generated script must preserve the safe sequence candidate scan -> intake -> RC preflight -> live no-fake RC gate -> real-adapter evidence bundle verification -> v0 readiness recheck, refuse fake-backend mode, require a real bearer token, and keep current local release state NOT_GO.
head: 4f4cb5e
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA handoff generator/tests/current handoff evidence, including artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_handoff.sh, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Generated shell artifact runs real_adapter_evidence_bundle_verification before v0 readiness recheck
Generated shell artifact refuses MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND and requires a real MIB_RUNTIME_BEARER_TOKEN
Handoff Markdown mentions the executable shell artifact and bundle GO as a required v0 release precondition
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate updates operator handoff execution tooling only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped executable handoff artifact gate after confirming final completion is still blocked by missing external CUDA real-adapter evidence, and the current handoff is Markdown/JSON only.
phase_notes.audit: Read the current handoff generator, focused tests, generated JSON/Markdown handoff, v0 readiness audit, and WORKING state. The remaining release blocker is external real CUDA adapter evidence, and the existing handoff required manual command copying from Markdown/JSON.
phase_notes.build: Added render_shell/script_command support, --shell-output, and executable_artifact metadata to scripts/build_real_adapter_handoff.py. The generated shell refuses MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND, requires a real 32+ character MIB_RUNTIME_BEARER_TOKEN, and runs the established safe command sequence through bundle verification before v0 readiness.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused handoff pytest, regenerated JSON/Markdown/Shell handoff artifacts, handoff JSON validation, shell bash -n, marker rg, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, v0 JSON validation, hook-required .venv m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Executable CUDA handoff artifact gate is complete. Current local evidence remains WAITING_FOR_REAL_ADAPTER_INPUTS / NOT_GO and no release GO is claimed.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA handoff generator/tests/evidence shell artifact, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim from current local artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
